channel.title: Storming of the US Capitol (Jan, 2021) - Tag - bounds.dev
channel.description: Storming of the US Capitol (Jan, 2021) - Tag - bounds.dev

item.title: Capitols and Conflicts
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

Capitols and Conflicts

On Jan. 6, chaos once reigned,
Prosecutors were fired, some chained.
In Donbas, they fight,
For peace talks ignite,
While sanctions on Russia remain strained.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • Reframing Jan. 6: After the Pardons, the Purge
  • Peace Talks in Ukraine All Lead to the Donbas
  • Why Haven’t Sanctions on Russia Stopped the War? The Money Is Still Flowing.

item.title: Congress's Awkward Dance
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

Congress’s Awkward Dance

In Congress, the mood’s quite a sight,
As they gather with memories tight.
Kamala’s awkward task,
In a past filled with flasks,
While Trump claims his electoral right.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • Congress to Certify Trump’s Election, With Memories of Riot Looming Large
  • Harris Faces an Awkward Election Task: Certifying the Vote She Lost
  • Who Owns Jan. 6?
